key.name: netbird-url
key.description: Management and admin URL for NetBird. Used as both --management-url and --admin-url when invoking the netbird CLI.

key.name: daemon-addr
key.description: NetBird daemon socket address (unix:///path or tcp://host:port).

key.name: poll-interval
key.description: Safety-net poll for NetBird status. The extension already reacts instantly to WireGuard interface changes (sysfs inotify) and refreshes on menu open, so this can safely be long.

key.name: connect-on-startup
key.description: Automatically run `netbird up` when the extension starts.

key.name: show-notifications
key.description: Show desktop notifications for errors and SSO login prompts.

key.name: allow-ssh
key.description: Pass --allow-server-ssh to `netbird up`. Toggling while connected triggers an automatic reconnect.

key.name: enable-rosenpass
key.description: Pass --enable-rosenpass to `netbird up`. Post-quantum key exchange (experimental). Toggling while connected triggers an automatic reconnect.

key.name: enable-lazy-connection
key.description: Pass --enable-lazy-connection to `netbird up`. Establish peer connections on-demand (experimental). Toggling while connected triggers an automatic reconnect.

key.name: block-inbound
key.description: Pass --block-inbound to `netbird up`. Disallow inbound connections to the local machine and routed networks. Toggling while connected triggers an automatic reconnect.
